title: onobrychis neychalanensis
intro: Onobrychis neychalanensis, also known as Persian clover, is a perennial legume native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Onobrychis neychalanensis include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as having potential applications in treating cardiovascular diseases and diabetes. Herbal preparations of Onobrychis neychalanensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
